hero.eyebrow: Certified installers in the Canary Islands
hero.title: We design your energy independence
hero.body: The local energy partner of reference for Canarian companies. Audit, grants, installation and maintenance.

manifesto.statement: Light as origin, balance as system, and energy as order.
manifesto.note: We design the energy independence of the businesses that hold the Canary Islands together.
manifesto.label: Energía Solar Canarias

stats.title: Twenty years reshaping the energy bill of the archipelago.

benefits.title: The energy partner that understands the islands.

items.label: We know the territory
items.desc: Over two decades operating in the archipelago. We understand its climate, its regulations and its particularities like no outsider can.

items.label: We manage everything
items.desc: From the energy diagnosis to the grant, the installation and the maintenance. A single point of contact, zero friction.

items.label: We simplify the decision
items.desc: We give you certainty before you commit. Feasibility study, financial scenarios and real timelines from day one.

items.label: We're always there
items.desc: Continuous support, monitoring and reporting. We're not a one-off supplier: we're your long-term energy partner.

sectores.title: Every sector demands a different energy.
sectores.body: We design energy architectures tailored to the operations that sustain the Canarian economy.

items.label: Hotels
items.title: Energy that protects the guest experience
items.desc: Large-scale rooftops, storage and critical maintenance. Zero operational downtime.
items.metric: Up to 45% lower cost per room·year

items.label: Industry
items.title: Production lines shielded from price swings
items.desc: Warehouses, industrial cooling, HVAC. Sized to real peak demand.

items.label: Retail
items.title: Distributed operations, unified billing
items.desc: Multi-store, multi-island. Centralized monitoring and financial reporting per point of sale.

items.label: Agribusiness
items.title: Pumping, irrigation and cooling, self-powered
items.desc: Shared self-consumption, storage and full grant management for the agricultural sector.

hogares.label: Homes too
hogares.title: Canarian residential with payback under 7 years.
hogares.body: Domestic installations sized to island climate and tariffs. The free energy that belongs to you, too.

proceso.title: A single point of contact, from the first kilowatt to the last report.

items.title: Diagnosis
items.body: Consumption audit, return simulation and generation plan by island and sector.

items.title: Grants
items.body: We fully manage the grant application process. A complex journey we make simple for you.

items.title: Installation
items.body: Local team, committed deadlines. Zero operational downtime.

items.title: Maintenance
items.body: Continuous monitoring, scheduled reviews, periodic reporting. Your installation, always under control.

casos.title: Energy already in operation.
casos.subtitle: A selection of installations operating across the archipelago — measurable results, deadlines met, grants secured.

items.title: 4,200 m² rooftop
items.detail: 35% grant managed in 11 weeks. Zero downtime.

items.title: Solar pumping · 18 ha
items.detail: Shared self-consumption with neighbouring cooperative. Full grant management.

founder.name: Carla Isarí Díaz Ortega
founder.credentials: 20 years in the Canarian energy sector
founder.quote: We believe energy is free — given by nature, meant for all. Our mission is to transform it and bring it to where it belongs: every business and home across the Canarian archipelago.

testimonials.title: What those already operating with us say.

items.name: Sofía Rubio
items.quote: If you're looking for professionalism, quality and long-term trust, they are without doubt the best. A 10 out of 10 experience.

items.name: Miguel Ángel Sánchez
items.quote: Fast, clean work. They handled all the paperwork. I'm covering the consumption of my home and my electric car.

items.name: Ton Pot
items.quote: Very satisfied with the delivery, installation and grant application process. The staff are friendly and professional.

items.name: Juan Monzón
items.quote: Fast, clean, they handle all the paperwork and the staff are very professional. Highly recommended.

items.name: Grancanarion
items.quote: Works perfectly. Full solar study and they always respond to any query. No complaints in 5 years.

items.name: Julio Rubio Robles
items.quote: Excellent professionals, always focused on the best solution for the client. Tremendously satisfied with the whole process.
